onboarding.title: Business Information
onboarding.staff_desc: You can invite them later. For now, we just need their names for the booking calendar.
onboarding.name: Name
onboarding.ready_desc1: We'll set up standard working hours (9 AM - 5 PM, Mon-Fri) which you can customize later in the dashboard.
onboarding.ready_desc2: You'll also start on a 14-day free trial of our Professional Plan (€30/month).

booking.no_appointments: Unfortunately, there are no available appointments for the selected date.
booking.choose_another_date: Please choose another date or professional.
booking.success_msg: Your appointment has been successfully scheduled.

system.unexpected_error: Something went wrong. Please refresh the page and try again.

auth.confirmed: Email confirmed successfully. You can now sign in.
auth.access_description: Sign in once. The platform will load the business and industry connected to your account.
auth.authorized_only: Business owners and authorised staff only. Customers access accounts through each business’s public page.
auth.secure_workspace: One secure workspace for every business type
auth.hero_title: Manage your business from one professional platform.
auth.hero_description: Your account opens the correct workspace automatically—whatever service industry you operate in.
auth.secure_access_text: Each company’s customers, staff and operational records remain separated inside the platform.
auth.membership_note: One login page is intentionally used for every owner. Your membership determines the correct business and theme after authentication.

staff.title: Staff
staff.description: Manage employee profiles, service skills and weekly availability.
staff.confirmRemove: Remove {{name}}? Existing appointments may prevent permanent deletion.

empty.title: No staff members yet
empty.description: Add your first professional and configure services and working hours.

status.label: Active Status
status.description: Active staff can receive new bookings.

services.label: Services
services.title: Services Offered
services.description: Select every service this professional can perform.

dialog.description: Configure the profile, services and weekly availability.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Information customers will see on the storefront.

schedule.title: Weekly Schedule
schedule.description: These hours determine the available booking slots.

inactive.title: Temporary Inactive Period
inactive.description: Use this for holidays, leave or another temporary absence.

breaks.title: Breaks (Optional)
breaks.description: Add recurring breaks. These times will be blocked from owner and public bookings.
breaks.emptyDescription: Breaks are optional. Add one only when this professional needs it.

validation.breakOnClosedDay: A break cannot be added on a closed day
validation.invalidBreakTime: Enter a valid break time for {{day}}
validation.inactiveDateOrder: Inactive end date must be after the start date
